title: Optimized Portfolio Rebalancing
scenario: Given a portfolio consisting of five assets with their current weights and standard deviations, generate a mathematical formula as a prompt to optimize the rebalancing of the portfolio, taking into account the expected return and risk tolerance. The target output should be a Python formula using conditional statements.
constraints: Must use a conditional statement with a ternary operator

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically valid.
Verify if the generated formula accurately implements the portfolio rebalancing algorithm.
Evaluate the code's readability and adherence to Python best practices.
